mapper.sql: id, like_threshold, view_threshold, total_odic_stake, stake_tip, stake_rule_title, stake_rule_content, audit_rule_title, audit_rule_content, complaint_notice, credit_min, credit_max, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from t_piamom_hot_config order by id asc
mapper.insert: insert into t_piamom_hot_config (like_threshold, view_threshold, total_odic_stake, stake_tip, stake_rule_title, stake_rule_content, audit_rule_title, audit_rule_content, complaint_notice, credit_min, credit_max, status) values (#{likeThreshold}, #{viewThreshold}, #{totalOdicStake}, #{stakeTip}, #{stakeRuleTitle}, #{stakeRuleContent}, #{auditRuleTitle}, #{auditRuleContent}, #{complaintNotice}, #{creditMin}, #{creditMax}, #{status})
